title: Faux Orchid in Vase Tall Artificial Orchid in Ceramic Vase Tall Silk Orchids with Stems Real Look Potted Fake Phalaenopsis Arrangement Centerpiece Table Decorations for Home Decor Indoor, White
features: 【Look Real Orchid Arrangement】The phalaenopsis orchid artificial arrangement features soft petals hovering above dark green leaves, with a ceramic pot on the bottom. Sporting an elegant look that adds so much warmth and freshness to our living space! Beautiful centerpiece on dining room table. Different from other plastic flowers, our gorgeous artificial orchids mimic the vivid color and shape of live orchids, like real flowers, no fadeing!

【Easy To Bend Stem＆Leaves】18 flowers on 3 stems in total. The orchids in pot measure 22"/29" Tall. Flower Diameter: min2.76in/70mm, max3.74in/95mm, and the flower pot size approx. 4.13in/105mm x 4.33in/110mm. The faux orchid stems and leaves are bendable, easy to re-shape and extended to achieve its intended appearance.

【Easy Maintenance】No upkeep is required except for a quick dust every now and then, it's also remain its beautiful blooms for a long time. Saving your lots of time, money, and energy. Come with three clips, two mini beetles as decor.

【Use】The artificial orchid arrangement is a nice centerpiece so that they are popular in office, home, bedroom, living room, bathroom, kitchen, balcony and other furniture decorations. It is also perfect for wedding, stage, party, festivals, office, garden, hotel, festive furnishing and any other place that you want to decorate.

【Best Present for Loved Ones】The phalaenopsis flowers means love, happiness is coming. A symbol of elegant and classy. It can be a best gift for yourself and your loved ones at Birthday, Valentine's Day, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Thanksgiving, Christmas etc. It also was great gift for anyone who really likes Orchids.
description: Artificial Orchid Flowers with Vase for Home Office Hotel Table Decoration This faux phalaenopsis orchid features beautiful blooms with luscious green foliage and real moss, which adds to its realistic appearance. The faux orchid stems and leaves can be bent to the appropriate shape. The orchids give off a blissful feel and can be placed anywhere in your home, white office decor, farmhouse or even as elegant wedding decor. Ready to display silk flowers arrangements are made easy with this fake flower pot. Decorate your mantel, entryway, foyer table, living room, dining table, kitchen, bathroom and more with this potted orchid plant! These fake flowers in pots make a lovely present for a housewarming party, wedding, birthday and other occasions. The recipient will be delighted to receive this decorative accent. Five colors of orchid plants are available: Dark Purple/Golden Blue/Fuchsia/Purple/White Pot Color：White Pot Material: Ceramic Flower Head Material: Fabric Whole Size: 22"/29" High Pot Size: 4.13in/105mm x 4.33in/110mm Flower Diameter: min2.76in/70mm, max3.74in/95mm Warm Tips: *The flower heads, branches may be squeezed during transportation and needs a simple manual adjustment to get a superb orchids. *There would be accumulated dust if you put it in a place for very long time, you can use the hair dryer with cold wind to remove the dust. *If it was seriously dirty, you could sink it into salt water with high concentration for 10 minutes and then add neutral detergent and then rinse twice. *For a long time use, do not expose the faux orchids to the hot sun.
